headlines.title: Track U.S., state and county gas prices
headlines.description: Are gas prices declining? NBC News is tracking national, state and county prices at the pump.

headlines.title: SpaceX stock closes below its IPO price for the first time since it went public
headlines.description: Shares of SpaceX continued their sharp descent Thursday and closed below the company’s IPO price for the first time since its June public offering.

headlines.title: WH teleprompter operator on leave for alleged insider trading on Trump's speeches
headlines.description: A longtime White House teleprompter operator has been placed on administrative leave for allegedly making prediction market bets on President Trump speeches. Gabriel Perez is in talks to settle with the Commodity Futures Trading Commission, according to a source familiar with the matter.

headlines.title: Truth Social plans to sell Wall Street firms 'fast' access to president's posts
headlines.description: Truth Social plans to sell Wall Street firms 'fast' access to President Trump's posts. The product, called ‘Truth API’, will deliver posts from the 10 most influential accounts to customers at a significantly ​faster pace than a regular push notification.

headlines.title: Score 70% off Deals at Shop TODAY’s First-Ever Sample Sale
headlines.description: Shop TODAY is bringing back fan favorites from beauty, tech and fashion in its first-ever sample sale! Items include a Kate Somerville exfoliating treatment, a Wavytalk thermal brush, a Bagsmart puffer tote and more.

headlines.title: How to Save on Medical Bills and Handle Unexpected Costs
headlines.description: Navigating medical bills can be stressful and confusing so NBC’s Christine Romans joins TODAY with ways to save and what to do if your bill comes in higher than expected, including requesting an itemized bill and filing an appeal.

headlines.title: How grocery prices have changed since Trump took office
headlines.description: Learn where grocery prices stand during the Trump administration. See how inflation is affecting the cost of eggs, bread, chicken, ground beef and more.

headlines.title: Police arrest man who shouted racial slur at ‘TODAY’ co-anchor Craig Melvin
headlines.description: New York City police arrested a man Thursday morning after he allegedly entered an unauthorized area near the “TODAY” show studio and shouted a racial slur at co-anchor Craig Melvin, according to multiple people familiar with the matter and a statement from NBC News.

headlines.title: Thirsty England fans could down an extra 6 million pints during semifinal clash
headlines.description: Overall “margins are getting squeezed because it is a tough time for pubs right now,” one pub owner told NBC News.

headlines.title: Oil continues rising despite Trump’s dropping Hormuz ‘reimbursement fee’
headlines.description: The price of international Brent crude oil has risen more than 15% since Sunday to levels not seen since June.

headlines.title: Inflation eased to 3.5% in June, just before energy prices spiked again
headlines.description: Inflation eased to 3.5% in June, thanks to energy prices that fell after the U.S. and Iran signed a memorandum of understanding in a bid to end the ongoing war.

headlines.title: Oil surges more than 9% after Trump reimposes Iran blockade
headlines.description: Trump said the U.S. “will be reimbursed” for helping ships through the Strait of Hormuz. Crude oil hit its highest price in about a month.
